title: Delhi court grants bail to man booked for AI-morphed picture of PM Narendra Modi bowing to Shah Rukh Khan
description: A Delhi court recently granted regular bail to Mujahid Jamal Shaikh, a 34-year-old man accused of posting an AI-morphed image of Prime Minister Narendra Modi bowing to Bollywood actor Shah Rukh Khan on social media platform X.Additional Sessions Judge (ASJ) Saurabh Pratap Singh Laler of the Patiala House Courts granted bail to Shaikh after noting that he has deep roots in the society and has no prior criminal record. The Court said that there was no likelihood of his absconding or tampering with
